name: ynt-dashboard-backend
description: YNT Digital Marketing Internal Dashboard — Backend API

scripts.seed: node --experimental-sqlite -e "const Database = require('./db/client'); const { initializeDatabase } = require('./db/init'); const db = new Database('./db/ynt.db'); db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL'); db.pragma('foreign_keys = ON'); initializeDatabase(db); db.close();"
scripts.reset-db: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); try { fs.rmSync('./db/ynt.db', { force: true }); } catch {}" && npm run seed
